mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_session (trainer_id, title, start_time, status) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{title}, #{startTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id, title, start_time, end_time, status FROM live_session ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE live_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE live_session SET end_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
